## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss feedback on HockeyStack's content strategy and align on next steps for refining positioning and content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Persona updates: Marketing leader, Go-to-Market Ops (including RevOps, MarketingOps, SalesOps), and SDR leader](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Focus on improving key metrics, avoiding attribution battles in messaging](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Need to refine HockeyStack's positioning in AI-generated search results and content](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Plan to create LLMS.txt file for improved LLM crawling of HockeyStack's Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

## Topics

### Persona and ICP Refinement

  - [Updated personas: Marketing leader, Go-to-Market Ops (including RevOps, MarketingOps, SalesOps), and SDR leader](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Avoid focusing on attribution battles or revenue recognition as primary motivators](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Emphasis on improving key metrics rather than debating credit for marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Content Strategy and Positioning

  - [Need to refine HockeyStack's positioning in AI-generated search results](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Focus on accurate representation of HockeyStack's capabilities, especially AI features](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Plan to provide list of search terms and phrases to improve narrative around HockeyStack](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Using Scrunch tool to track HockeyStack's presence across various prompts and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Planning to generate LLMS.txt file for improved LLM crawling of HockeyStack's Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/refeQGjxwQvx_vrtWVz4BqVkECZbcZqC?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Product Deep Dive
